raw.message:

hook.summary: Character reveal of Zeta with gameplay highlights and high-value currency rewards.
hook.visual_action: Split-screen layout featuring character art and small gameplay windows.
hook.text_overlay: 新規ユーザー限定 最大 18,300個 幻魔石がもらえる！
hook.voiceover_transcript: 準備はOK。音より光より早く。

scene_flow: Introduction of Zeta with split-screen gameplay and reward banners.
Close-up of Zeta's face as she speaks to the player.
Full character art reveal showcasing her white and red combat suit.
Shadow Fest event announcement with bold text overlay.
Final splash screen with game logo, character name, and download incentive.
